reviews.comment:
Es grande.  Tienen baños grandes y varias clsas para comprar para consumir.
Tener en cuenta que esa es la última estación de servicio camino al norte desde que arranca Santiago hasta la capital. Tener eso en cuenta por baños, combustible y comida

(Translated by Google)
It's large. They have spacious restrooms and several shops where you can buy food and drinks.
Keep in mind that this is the last gas station heading north from Santiago to the capital. Consider this in terms of restrooms, fuel, and food availability.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyNmFYbU5nEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención.  Muy concurrido y ralentiza la carga de combustible

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Very busy and slows down fuel loading.

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio amplia y cómoda, en el km 928 de la RN 9. Agradable el sector de servicios de comidas y bebidas, con mesas cubiertas en el exterior.

(Translated by Google)
Spacious and comfortable service station, at km 928 of RN 9. The food and beverage service area is pleasant, with covered tables outside.

reviews.comment:
Si bien el contingente llegó en horas muy tempranas (0630) poco personal para la atención al público en el full, los baños un desastre total por su falta de aseo, nada que ver con otras estaciones de servicios.

(Translated by Google)
Although the contingent arrived very early (0630), there was little staff to attend to the public at the full, the bathrooms were a total disaster due to their lack of cleanliness, nothing like other service stations.
